results.title: Efficient LoRA Fine-Tuning Guide (Databricks)
results.note: Generic LoRA guide — freezes base + trains adapter, but no fixed-template prompt vocabulary restriction and no cryptographic fire-lock seal. Missing both distinctive mechanisms.

results.title: QA-LoRA Quantization-Aware Low-Rank Adaptation (2024)
results.note: Quantization-aware LoRA captures the quantize-freeze aspect but lacks fixed K-template prompt vocabulary restriction and cryptographic hash seal. Only partial overlap.

results.title: LoftQ LoRA-Fine-Tuning-Aware Quantization (ICLR 2024)
results.note: Quantization-aware LoRA init only; no template vocabulary restriction at training time, no cryptographic seal.

results.title: QLoRA Efficient Finetuning of Quantized LLMs
results.note: 4-bit base quantize + LoRA, but quantizes base not adapter post-FT; no fixed-template prompt vocabulary, no cryptographic fire-lock.

results.title: LoRA + Prompt Engineering Q&A Study (2025)
results.note: Combines LoRA with prompt engineering for Q&A but does not restrict training-time prompts to a fixed K-template vocabulary and no fire-lock cryptographic seal step.

results.title: PEFT/LoRA/QLoRA/LLaMA-Adapter Survey
results.note: Generic PEFT survey, no fixed prompt-template vocabulary mechanism, no cryptographic seal.

results.title: LoRA + QLoRA Guide
results.note: Practical narrow-domain LoRA+QLoRA guide, lacks fixed K-template prompt restriction and cryptographic fire-lock.

results.title: Patching LLM like Software Lightweight Safety Patch (2025/11)
results.note: Learnable prefix/safety patch at input embeddings — orthogonal to fixed-template training restriction + cryptographic adapter sealing.
